subject: [OOM] Use cert-initializer truststore instead of hard-coded ONAP Root CA
commit_message:
[OOM] Use cert-initializer truststore instead of hard-coded ONAP Root CA

By adding the certInitializer directives in cds blueprint processor
deployment, we get access to the AAF ONAP Root CA, instead of static file.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3356
Signed-off-by: Abdelmuhaimen Seaudi <abdelmuhaimen.seaudi@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ifc3d1797905868b268cbfd06237866bf8dc3d3f5

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3169/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3169/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3169/ )
